overview.about: New Capital City Spa Retreat is one of MQ's most celebrated destination destinations, located in Capital City, MQ. It captivates visitors with its extraordinary character, historical depth and natural beauty that has drawn travellers from across the world for generations.

highlights.label: Centuries of Living History
highlights.desc: Structures standing for hundreds to thousands of years — each stone a silent chronicle of empires and civilisations

highlights.label: UNESCO World Heritage Site
highlights.desc: Recognised globally for outstanding universal value and protected as one of Earth's most significant cultural landmarks

highlights.label: Iconic Photography Spot

highlights.label: Architectural Masterpiece
highlights.desc: Precision engineering predating modern tools — symmetry, scale and craftsmanship that continues to baffle experts today

overview.about: Royal North Martinique Coastal Resort is one of MQ's most celebrated beach paradise destinations, located in North Martinique, MQ. It captivates visitors with its extraordinary character, historical depth and natural beauty that has drawn travellers from across the world for generations.

highlights.label: Pristine Award-Winning Shores
highlights.desc: Crystal-clear azure waters fringing powder-white sands — consistently ranked among the world's most stunning coastlines

highlights.label: Premier Water Sports Hub
highlights.desc: Snorkelling, scuba diving, surfing and sailing in ideal conditions — equipment and instructors available year-round

highlights.label: Exceptional Sunset Views
highlights.desc: Catch the sky blaze in vivid gold and pink as the sun sets over the horizon — cited as a life-changing moment

highlights.label: Protected Marine Ecosystem
highlights.desc: Vibrant coral reefs, sea turtles and tropical fish — responsible tourism preserves these habitats for generations

highlights.label: Awe-Inspiring Peaks
